//: Spine registry manifest for the Video Factory project. Modeled on projects/report-factory/spine.skills.json. Discovered via POST /registry/discover; its agent + skills appear in Spine's /skills, /agents and the Skills & Agents console page.
title: Video Factory
description: Image-to-video automation for ecommerce catalogs. CSV of SKUs -> generated, finished, QC-gated short videos at scale.

source.//: Spine §15: own repo, one-way auto-synced into TheSpine/projects/video-factory/. Owner edits here; the mirror is downstream/read-only.

connector.//: Spine's connector hub calls these endpoints under the allow-list. Reads run live; writes pass the approval gate.

skills.name: Build generation prompt
skills.description: Turn an FSN manifest row (USPs, callouts, tier, images) into an optimized image-to-video prompt + model routing. The reshoot-rate cost lever.

skills.name: Generate clip (fal.ai)
skills.description: Image-to-video via fal.ai (Kling default, Seedance for hero SKUs), Replicate secondary. Writes a clip; governed + audited.

skills.name: Finish clip to spec (FFmpeg)
skills.description: Deterministic: dimensions, two-pass size band, duration clamp, watermark, callout supers, music mux, end-frame rule.

skills.name: QC auto-check + flag
skills.description: Auto-checkable SOW params (dims/size/duration/watermark/spell-check/color delta) + VLM flagging (multiple models, missing garment, logo distortion).

skills.name: Deliver to Drive + writeback
skills.description: On QC approval, publish to Google Drive and write status back to the manifest. The human QC gate maps to Spine's approval queue.
